title: ReplicationController — API Object
text:
Replication controller is a top-level resource in the Kubernetes REST API. More details about the
API object can be found at:
ReplicationController API object
.

ReplicaSet
is the next-generation ReplicationController that supports the new
set-based label selector
.
It's mainly used by
Deployment
as a mechanism to orchestrate pod creation, deletion and updates.
Note that we recommend using Deployments instead of directly using Replica Sets, unless you require custom update orchestration or don't require updates at all.
